flashcards.back: The branch that explains motion, forces, and how things move. Falling balls, orbiting planets, moving cars.
The branch about heat and temperature. Why things heat up, cool down, how energy moves between objects.
The branch about charged particles and magnets. How batteries work, how magnets attract things, how electrical currents flow.
The branch about light and sound. How light travels, how sound moves, why rainbows exist, how radios work.
The branch about atoms and tiny particles. How electrons behave, what atoms look like, why things work at the atomic scale.
The branch about extreme speeds and forces. Relativity (super fast speeds), nuclear reactions, black holes, particles.
